title: Desert Lapis
description: Adds extra lapis lazuli ore to deserts, like gold ore in badlands.
body:
This pack adds extra lapis lazuli ore in the desert.

It generates with the same rules as extra gold ore in the badlands: above y = 32.

Since lapis ore generates in an extra batch up to y = 64, this means that technically, the best region to mine for lapis is from y = 32 to y = 64 in the desert.
